metadata.file_name: Berlin - Take My Breath Away (Love Theme from Top Gun).flac
metadata.title: Take My Breath Away (Love Theme from "Top Gun")
metadata.album: Top Gun - Motion Picture Soundtrack (Special Expanded Edition)
metadata.lyrics:
[00:11.59] Watching every motion in my foolish lover's game
[00:19.07] 
[00:21.26] On this endless ocean, finally lovers know no shame
[00:28.56] 
[00:31.38] Turning and returning to some secret place inside
[00:39.16] 
[00:41.57] Watching in slow motion, as you turn around and say
[00:50.02] Take my breath away
[00:54.76] 
[01:00.42] Take my breath away
[01:05.30] 
[01:11.47] Watching, I keep waiting, still anticipating love
[01:21.26] Never hesitating to become the fated ones
[01:29.71] 
[01:32.44] Turning and returning to some secret place to hide
[01:41.36] Watching in slow motion, as you turn to me and say, my love
[01:50.91] Take my breath away
[01:55.38] 
[02:01.66] Through the hourglass, I saw you, in time you slipped away
[02:11.58] When the mirror crashed, I called you, and turned to hear you say
[02:21.26] If only for today, I am unafraid
[02:30.05] Take my breath away
[02:35.62] 
[02:40.83] Take my breath away
[02:44.51] 
[02:51.44] Watching every motion in this foolish lover's game
[02:58.62] 
[03:01.50] Haunted by the notion somewhere there's a love in flames
[03:09.78] 
[03:11.98] Turning and returning to some secret place inside
[03:21.74] Watching in slow motion, as you turn to me and say
[03:30.79] Take my breath away, my love
[03:40.43] Take my breath away, my love
[03:50.98] Take my breath away, my love
[03:57.38] 
[04:00.41] Take my breath away, my love
[04:07.21]
